messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?
Thank you, Nagraj! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under? Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?
It is regarding water issue, which department can I contact?

Nagraj, based on the category you've specified, for Water Supply-related issues, you can contact the BWSSB (Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board). You can reach out to them through their helpline number 1916. They operate between 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM, Monday to Saturday. If you have an urgent issue, a 24
Nagraj, unfortunately, the provided knowledge base does not have specific information on registering a complaint for a water supply issue. Could you please describe the nature of your water issue?
